positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a mountain landscape at sunrise. The mountains should have deep indigo and violet tones, contrasting sharply with an ethereal gradient sky transitioning from soft orange to pale gold near the horizon. In the foreground, a group of stylized, silhouetted deciduous trees are arranged in an asymmetrical yet balanced pattern. Focus on strong, clean lines and negative space. The composition should be perfectly centered, suitable for a t-shirt graphic, utilizing graphic design principles and flat design elements mixed with watercolor washes. Clean lines, deep contrast, highly detailed, digital illustration, vector art style, symmetrical composition, perfect symmetry, isolated on a solid background.
